steps.title: Relate the angles
steps.content:
The angle vertical to the angle marked $y$ also measures $y$. That angle and the angle marked $x$ are same-side interior angles on parallel lines, so they are supplementary.
$$x+y=180$$

steps.title: Use the inequality
steps.content:
Since $y<65$, subtracting $y$ from $180$ gives a value greater than subtracting $65$.
$$x=180-y>180-65=115$$
The answer is B.
